titleStmt.title: SII 28.240: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 240. (A.R. No. 395 of 1913.)

summary.p: Eṟumbūr, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.
Kadambavanēśvara temple, central shrine, north wall.

The record starts with the king's meykkīrtti beginning with Tirumanni vaḷara and states that for burning a perpetual lamp and to arrange for the supply of the food-offerings to God Mahādēva of the Śiṟuttirukkōyil in Uṟumūr, a brahmadēyam in Nalvayalūr-kūṟṟam, Irājēndraśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu, Kaviṇiyaṉ Śaṅkaranārāyaṇaṉ of the same village gifted a plot of land called mārāyampaḷḷam of 1/2 and 1/8 vēli that is 12(1/2) mā in extent.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunila maṭantaiyum poṟ ceya
ppāvaiyum cirttaniccelviyum tanperunteviyarāki
Inpuṟa ne m muḻiyuḷ Iṭai tuṟai nāṭum tuṭarvana velippaṭa
r vanavāciyum cuḷḷiccūḻ matiḻ koḷḷipākaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ
maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭal Īḻattaraiyar tamuṭiyum Āṅkavaṉ te
viyaroṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavaṉ pakkaṟ teṉṉavar vacca cunta
ramuṭiyum Intiraṉ nāramum teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipa
ṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyilc cūṭum kulatanamākiya palarpu
kaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatir velait tol peruṅkā
val palapaḻantivum māpporuntaṇṭāṟk koṇṭa kopparakesari
paṉmarāna śrīrājentracoḻadevarkku yaāṇṭu Āṟāvatu vaṭakarai Irā
jentra(ra)ciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu nalvayalūrk kūṟṟattu brahmadeyam Uṟumur ciṟut
tirukkoyil mahādevarkku Ivvūr kaviṇiyaṉ caṅkaranārāyaṇaṉ non=tāvi
nānāḻit tiruvamutukkum Oru kaṟiyamutukkum kuṭutta nilamāvatu śrīyarumoḻi te
vappereri kiḻmārāyampaḷḷameṉṟu per kūvappaṭum nilattukku kiḻpā
ṟkellai Erivāykkālukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai kaṭampāṟṟukku vaṭakku
m melpāṟkellai kāśśapaṉ kāṭaṉ nārāyaṇaṉuḷḷiṭṭār kalamāḻkiṟa
nilattukku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai Āritan nakkan paṟpanāpan nilattukku te
ṟkum Ivvicaitta perunānkellaikkum Akappaṭṭa nila mikutik kuṟaivu
ḷ vuḷḷaṭaṅka nilam Araiye Araikkāl Itu paṉmāyeśvarar rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 28.240 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
